name: Pinterest
description: Pinterest is a visual discovery and bookmarking platform where users save and organize ideas as pins on boards. The API v5 allows agents to create and manage pins and boards, retrieve user account data, access analytics, manage board sections, and handle media uploads.

capabilities.name: pin_create
capabilities.description: Create a new pin on a specified board with an image URL, title, description, and optional destination link.

capabilities.name: pins_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of pins owned by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: pin_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific pin including its image, description, board, and engagement metrics.

capabilities.name: pin_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing pin's title, description, link, or board.

capabilities.name: pin_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific pin owned by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: pin_save
capabilities.description: Save a pin to a board or board section.

capabilities.name: pin_analytics_get
capabilities.description: Get analytics for a specific pin owned by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: board_create
capabilities.description: Create a new board for the authenticated user with a name, description, and privacy setting.

capabilities.name: boards_list
capabilities.description: Fetch a paginated list of boards owned by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: board_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a specific board by ID.

capabilities.name: board_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing board's name, description, or privacy setting.

capabilities.name: board_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a specific board owned by the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: board_pins_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all pins saved to a specific board.

capabilities.name: board_section_create
capabilities.description: Create a new section within a board for organizing pins.

capabilities.name: board_sections_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all sections within a specific board.

capabilities.name: board_section_update
capabilities.description: Update the name of a board section.

capabilities.name: board_section_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a section from a board.

capabilities.name: board_section_pins_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve pins within a specific board section.

capabilities.name: user_account_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Pinterest profile including username, bio, follower count, and website URL.

capabilities.name: user_account_analytics_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve analytics data for the authenticated user's account.

capabilities.name: user_followers_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of the authenticated user's followers.

capabilities.name: user_following_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of users the authenticated user follows.

capabilities.name: media_upload
capabilities.description: Register intent to upload media and get an upload URL.
